sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO time_events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIME '14:21:13');
SELECT event_id, date_part('minute', event_time) AS event_minute FROM time_events;
UPDATE time_events SET event_time = TIME '15:30:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, date_part('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM time_events WHERE event_id = 1;
